text: Congratulations on becoming a parent! This is such an exciting milestone, and I'm genuinely thrilled for you. Becoming a parent is one of life's greatest adventures, and it's wonderful to see you embarking on this incredible journey. I'm sure you're going to be an amazing parent, and your little one is already so lucky to have you. Wishing you all the joy, love, and special moments that come with parenthood. Enjoy every precious moment!
